name: aming-claw
description: Codex plugin packaging for Aming Claw governance skills and MCP tools.

interface.longDescription: Provides the Aming Claw session skill, MCP resources, and MCP configuration so agents start with graph-first discovery, backlog/MF discipline, ServiceManager-aware runtime checks, and dashboard governance context.
defaultPrompt: Read the Aming Claw MCP resource aming-claw://skill or use $aming-claw before changing dashboard or governance code.
If governance is unavailable, read aming-claw://seed-graph-summary for packaged MVP structure, then ask the user to run aming-claw start.
Call graph_query with tool=query_schema, then inspect graph/status/backlog before implementation.
If services are offline, ask the user to run aming-claw start instead of silently starting workers.
